name: Vegelicious Ordering Information
recipeInstructions:
- Abersold Foods, 2730 Morley Way, Sacramento CA 95864
- Customer Service: 916-972-9142 or 800-275-1437 (Reference # 64888)
- Free mixer/server with first order over $29, only if you include above reference number
- Contents:
- Malto-dextrin (from potatoes)
- Cereal solids (from potatoes)
- High oleic sunflower oil
- Isolated soy protein
- Fructose
- Dehydrated honey
- Dicalcium phosphate
- Calcium gluconate
- Calcium citrate
- Natural flavors
- Sea salt
- Certified food color
- Isolated green pea protein
- Carrageenan
- Citric acid
- Powder lasts up to 1 year unmixed. Once mixed, lasts for 1 week.
- Package Prices:
- 2qt package: $2.95 each ($1.48 per quart)
- 5lb (25+ quarts): $29.95 ($1.17 per quart) makes 128 quarts
- 25lb in 5lb bags: $139.95 ($1.09 per quart) makes 256 quarts
- 50lb bag: $219.95 (.86 per quart) makes 512 quarts
- Add $4.00 for any size order.
- Delivered via UPS (they ship quickly)
